issues.title: Ambiguous behavior for parallel runtime failures
issues.why: §02 failure semantics define behavior for sequential phases, but for --parallel runtimes, it's unclear if a failure in 'ts' should abort an ongoing 'php' runtime or just prevent its next phase.
issues.fix: In §02, specify that --parallel runtime failures only abort subsequent phases within that specific runtime's goroutine.

issues.title: Missing example for SSH signature generation
issues.why: While §06 mentions the signing string and tool, it doesn't provide a worked example of the resulting header values, which are prone to encoding errors (Base64 vs Hex).
issues.fix: Add a sample SSH auth header block to §06 showing a dummy signature and nonce.

issues.title: Missing timeout for log shipping
issues.why: Phase timeouts are defined (1800s), but the network 'Push' operation lacks a specific timeout in the error catalog or config, potentially hanging the CI job on a zombie connection.
issues.fix: Add a default 'push_timeout_secs: 60' to the [push] section of the config schema.
